name: web-search-plus
tagline: ClawHub (99★): Unified multi-provider web search and URL extraction skill with intelligent auto-routing across Serper, Brave, Tavily, Queri
verdict: Solid marks across the board, with only soft warnings. The frontmatter description explains what it does but doesn't give concrete trigger phrases (those live only in the body), and its output metadata fields are scattered without one consolidated schema, making the actual output shape harder to predict up front.

highlights.summary: Frontmatter description says what the skill does in detail but never states concrete trigger situations/phrasings itself; those trigger phrases only appear later in the body's Trig
Individual metadata field names are scattered across several sections (result_filter, intent_rerank, locale, provider_errors) but no single consolidated output schema/shape for sea
